text:
To calculate Marcus' total bill with the loyalty card discount, we first need to calculate the total cost of the items before any discounts. Then, we apply the 10% discount to the total cost.

1. Calculate the total cost of the croissants:
\[ 5 \text{ croissants} \times \$3.00 = \$15.00 \]

2. Calculate the total cost of the cinnamon rolls:
\[ 4 \text{ cinnamon rolls} \times \$2.50 = \$10.00 \]

3. Calculate the total cost of the mini quiches:
\[ 3 \text{ mini quiches} \times \$4.00 = \$12.00 \]

4. Calculate the total cost of the blueberry muffins:
\[ 13 \text{ muffins} \times \$1.00 = \$13.00 \]

5. Add up the costs of all items to get the total before the discount:
\[ \$15.00 + \$10.00 + \$12.00 + \$13.00 = \$50.00 \]

6. Apply the 10% discount to the total:
\[ 10\% \text{ of } \$50.00 = 0.10 \times \$50.00 = \$5.00 \]
\[ \text{Total after discount} = \$50.00 - \$5.00 = \$45.00 \]

Thus, Marcus' total bill, after applying the 10% discount with his loyalty card, is \$45.00.
